creator: glebius@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Fri Mar 21 00:40:14  2025 UTC, fax@nohik.ee wrote:
> I compiled a debug kernel with the patch (14.2-RELEASE-p1 or p2 - kernel is
> same) and restarted a heavily loaded machine with it. Within almost an hour, I
> encountered this crash. I noticed that the crash message changed from 'page
> fault' to 'panic: tcp_do_segment: sent too much.'"

Eero, this is completely different problem, and good news is that it is finally
is being worked on. See bug 282605. The patch has been committed to CURRENT
yesterday and will get into stable/14 real soon.  Meanwhile you can add the
patch to your build, grab it here:

https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-src/commit/fbcf3b74e8f2c0c5ba37f1839bfe9395eb2fd0b1.patch

Very sorry that two most difficult bugs of 14.2-RELEASE have hit you.
